name: duckduckgo-search
description: Keyless, zero-config web search — no API key and no self-hosted instance. The out-of-box default so web_search works for everyone; bind a higher-quality provider (Tavily/Exa/…) per use-case in Search to upgrade. Links + snippets only.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search response.
